prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约14290→35075→20321→21662名，2023年因断档异常升至35075后回落，近两年稳定在20000–22000区间；2025年基准约21662 名；本省理科（物理类）计划2022年47人、2023年48人、2024年53人、2025年54人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划大幅增至68人，较2025年扩招约25.9%， 显著增加录取名额，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升：2021年65名→2022年66名→2023年67名→2024年71名→2025年62 名→2026年57名，排名稳步提升，对考生吸引力增强；2025年声誉评价偏负面（教授考核事件引发讨论），但2026年声誉数据中未单独列出该校，整体舆情平稳；抖音热度排名第73、评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显报考热潮或负面冲击；法学A（五院四系之一）、应用经济学A-，在财经政法领域具有 显著学科优势，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科招生专业社会热度偏热至高热推荐；金融/财经/经济类呈分化观 望；本省2026年物理类考生估算约32.9万人，较2025年（28.5万人）增加约15.5%，竞争加剧；学校位于湖北武汉，属中 部中心城市，对西南地区考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在四川招生计划占比较高，2025年理科54人、文科41人，属省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2166 2名、2026年大幅扩招约25.9%（推高位次、更易录取）与物理类考生增加约15.5%（推低位次、竞争加剧）的双向作用，扩招效应占主导；同时学校软科排名持续上升增强吸引力 。预测2026年最低录取位次约25082名，区间24582–25582名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 14290 → 35075 → 20321 → 21662. In 2023, due to an abnormal gap, it rose to 35075 before falling back, stabilizing in the 20000–22000 range in recent years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 21662. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 47 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 53 in 2024, and 54 in 2025, with a slight annual expansion. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 68, an expansion of about 25.9% compared to 2025, notably increasing admission slots and easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 65th in 2021 → 66th in 2022 → 67th in 2023 → 71st in 2024 → 62nd in 2025 → 57th in 2026, with a steady improvement in ranking, enhancing its appeal to candidates. In 2025, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to a professor assessment incident sparking discussion), but in 2026, the reputation data did not list the university separately, and overall public sentiment was stable. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 73rd, with a rating of 'average,' and short video exposure is moderate, with no obvious application surge or negative impact. Law is rated A (one of the Five Academies and Four Schools), and Applied Economics is rated A-, giving it significant disciplinary advantages in the fields of finance, economics, and law, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Science majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have social popularity ranging from moderately hot to highly recommended; Finance/Finance/Economics categories show a divergent wait-and-see attitude. In 2026, the estimated number of physics category candidates in the province is about 329,000, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 2025 (285,000), intensifying competition. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, a central city in central China, which has a certain regional appeal to candidates from the southwest. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan accounts for a relatively high proportion, with 54 science and 41 arts students in 2025, making it a key source province outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 21662, the significant enrollment expansion of about 25.9% in 2026 (pushing the ranking higher, making admission easier) and the increase in physics category candidates by about 15.5% (pushing the ranking lower, intensifying competition), the expansion effect dominates. At the same time, the university's steadily rising Soft Science ranking enhances its appeal. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 25082, with a range of 24582–25582.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 25082, range 24582–25582. If the ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, Tier 1 for a stretch, and Tier 3 as a safety. If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<24582), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Law Top Talent Class and Computer Science Excellent Talent Class. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>25582), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 2428 → 2645 → 3879 → 2521. After an anomaly in 2024 where it dropped to 3879, it rebounded significantly to 2521 in 2025, indicating a recovery in application popularity for the university's liberal arts programs. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2521. The provincial liberal arts (history category) enrollment plan was 44 in 2022, 45 in 2023, 45 in 2024, and 41 in 2025, with a slight reduction in 2025. The 2026 plan is 45, an increase of about 9.8% compared to 2025, leading to an increase in admission slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen to 57th in 2026, enhancing its appeal to candidates. In 2025, its reputation was somewhat negative (due to a professor evaluation incident), but in 2026, the university was not separately listed in reputation data, and overall public opinion was stable. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 73rd, with a rating of 'average,' showing no obvious application boom or negative impact. Its law program is rated A (one of the Five Academies and Four Schools), and applied economics is rated A-, giving it significant disciplinary advantages in finance, economics, and law, which strongly attract high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially popular but showing divergence; finance/banking/economics are diverging with a wait-and-see attitude; accounting/finance/auditing are recommended; journalism and communication are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the estimated number of history category candidates in the province is about 206,000, an increase of about 16% compared to 2025 (178,000), intensifying competition. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, a central city in central China, which has some regional appeal for candidates from the southwest. Its liberal arts enrollment plan in Sichuan is stable at 40–45, making it a key province for out-of-province student recruitment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the 2025 baseline ranking of 2521, a small expansion of about 9.8% in 2026 (pushing the ranking higher, making admission easier), and a 16% increase in history category candidates (pushing the ranking lower, intensifying competition), the increase in candidates is slightly larger than the expansion, and the university's rising ranking enhances its appeal. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 2639, with a range of 2164–3114.
